statement: In every magma, Equation 1624 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (u * y))`) implies Equation 2594 (`x = (y * ((z * y) * z)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0136
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op u y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z y) z)) z)
